rows.notes: P85 starts only after the landed green P84 keep-set closeout.
The merged-main rebaseline must run from the dedicated clean p85 branch.
The p85 branch should remain a clean descendant of merged origin/main.
The current mounted keep set should include p85 plus the short-term preserved p83 lineage.
Live control docs should make p85 current and p83 preserved merged-source lineage.
